vocab.meaning: tận hưởng, đắm mình trong (không khí, vẻ đẹp)
vocab.example: I spent the entire afternoon soaking up the creative atmosphere at the local contemporary art gallery.

vocab.meaning: nhìn chằm chằm một cách ngưỡng mộ
vocab.example: I found myself gazing at an abstract painting for nearly twenty minutes, trying to decipher its hidden meaning.
While wandering through the city, I stumbled upon a hidden gallery showcasing local avant-garde photography.

vocab.meaning: nhận ra, chọn ra một chi tiết cụ thể
vocab.example: The curator helped me pick out the subtle brushwork techniques that made the portrait so lifelike.
I still look back on my trip to the Louvre as one of the most culturally enriching experiences of my life.

vocab.meaning: thực sự bị ấn tượng, choáng ngợp
vocab.example: I was completely blown away by the sheer scale and intricacy of the sculptures on display.

vocab.meaning: có thể được coi là, được chấp nhận là
vocab.example: In some modern galleries, mundane objects often pass for high art, which I find quite intriguing.
The landscape paintings managed to conjure up vivid memories of my childhood in the countryside.

vocab.meaning: nghiên cứu kỹ lưỡng, xem xét tỉ mỉ
vocab.example: Art students usually pore over every detail of the masterpieces to understand the historical context.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng sang một lĩnh vực/thể loại mới
vocab.example: I usually prefer classical art, but recently I've decided to branch out into digital art exhibitions.
